clusters.leadHeadline: Padres Sale Breaks MLB Record at $3.9B With Clearlake Cofounder
clusters.summary: San Diego Padres ownership change to Clearlake Capital cofounder José E. Feliciano sets new MLB valuation benchmark. Business expansion signals continued growth in sports franchise valuations.

clusters.leadHeadline: Kansas City Approves $600M Stadium Deal for MLB's Royals
clusters.summary: Kansas City green-lights $600M public funding for Royals stadium project, though financing plan remains incomplete. Major infrastructure investment tied to MLB team operations.

clusters.leadHeadline: WNBA's New CBA Forces Liberty Stars into Major Salary Cuts
clusters.summary: Updated WNBA collective bargaining agreement restricts multi-max-player signings, forcing Liberty to cut salaries. New CBA fundamentally reshapes team roster construction and player compensation.

clusters.leadHeadline: NFL Draft Trade Frenzy: Giants Acquire 10th Pick from Bengals
clusters.summary: Giants-Bengals trade reshuffles first-round landscape with six teams now holding multiple picks. Draft capital consolidation affects contract structures and player valuation strategies.

clusters.leadHeadline: College Football's Transfer Portal and Revenue-Sharing Reshape NFL Draft
clusters.summary: College football's 2025 transfer portal and revenue-sharing model directly impact NFL draft QB class quality and tier distribution. Structural changes in college sports ripple through professional recruitment.

clusters.leadHeadline: LIV Golf Faces Existential Funding Crisis After Saudi Backing Disappears
clusters.summary: LIV Golf's viability threatened by loss of Saudi Arabian investor backing, forcing potential operational shutdown. League faces critical financial restructuring or dissolution.
